debug_info.goal:
a b : ℝ
ha : 0 < a
hb : 0 < b
⊢ 0 ∉ uIcc a b

proof:
have ha' : a ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt ha
    have hb' : b ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hb
    by_cases hab : a ≤ b
    · have h0 : a ≤ 0 ∧ 0 ≤ b → False := by
        intro h
        exact (not_le_of_gt ha) h.1
      have : ¬(a ≤ 0 ∧ 0 ≤ b) := by
        intro h; exact h0 h
      simpa [uIcc_of_le hab, mem_Icc, ha', hb'] using this
    · have hab' : b ≤ a := le_of_not_ge hab
      have h0 : b ≤ 0 ∧ 0 ≤ a → False := by
        intro h
        exact (not_le_of_gt hb) h.1
      have : ¬(b ≤ 0 ∧ 0 ≤ a) := by
        intro h; exact h0 h
      simpa [uIcc_of_ge hab', mem_Icc, ha', hb'] using this
failed_attempts: simp [uIcc, ha.ne', hb.ne']

have hmin : 0 < min a b := by
      have ha' : 0 < a := ha
      have hb' : 0 < b := hb
      exact lt_min ha' hb'
    intro h0
    have : min a b ≤ 0 := (min_le_left a b).trans h0.1
    exact (not_le_of_gt hmin) this
simpa [uIcc, ha.ne'] using (not_mem_uIcc_of_lt ha)

have ha' : 0 ≠ a := ne_of_gt ha
    have hb' : 0 ≠ b := ne_of_gt hb
    by_cases hab : a ≤ b
    · have : 0 < min a b := lt_min ha (lt_of_lt_of_le hb hab)
      exact fun h0 => (lt_irrefl (0:ℝ)) (lt_of_lt_of_le this (le_of_eq (by simpa using h0)))
    · have : 0 < min a b := lt_min (lt_of_lt_of_le ha (le_of_not_ge hab)) hb
      exact fun h0 => (lt_irrefl (0:ℝ)) (lt_of_lt_of_le this (le_of_eq (by simpa using h0)))

have ha0 : a ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt ha
    have hb0 : b ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hb
    simp [uIcc, ha0, hb0]

have hab : 0 < min a b := lt_min ha hb
    exact not_mem_uIcc_of_lt hab
simp [uIcc, ha.ne', hb.ne']
simp [uIcc, ha.ne', hb.ne']

have hne : a ≠ b := ne_of_gt (lt_trans ha hb)
    have hpos : 0 < min a b := lt_min ha hb
    intro h0
    have : min a b ≤ 0 := by
      have := (mem_uIcc.1 h0).1
      exact le_trans this le_rfl
    exact (not_lt_of_ge this) hpos

have ha0 : a ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt ha
    have hb0 : b ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hb
    intro h
    rcases h with ⟨h0a, h0b⟩
    have hab : a ≤ b := le_trans (le_of_lt ha) h0b
    have h0 : a = 0 := le_antisymm (le_trans hab h0a) (le_of_lt ha)
    exact ha0 h0

intro h0
    have ha' : a ≤ 0 := by
      have : 0 ∈ uIcc a b := h0
      exact (uIcc_subset_uIcc_left (le_of_lt ha)).1 (by simpa using this)
    exact (not_le_of_lt ha) ha'

intro h
    rcases h with ⟨h0a, h0b⟩
    have ha' : a ≤ 0 := by simpa using h0a
    exact (not_le_of_gt ha) ha'
simp [uIcc, ha.ne', hb.ne']

by_cases hab : a ≤ b
    · have h0a : 0 < min a b := by simpa [hab, min_eq_left hab] using ha
      have h0b : 0 < max a b := by
        have : b ≤ max a b := le_max_right a b
        exact lt_of_lt_of_le hb this
      intro h0
      have hmin : min a b ≤ 0 := (uIcc_subset_Icc_min_max hab) h0.1
      have hmax : 0 ≤ max a b := (uIcc_subset_Icc_min_max hab) h0.2
      exact (not_lt_of_le hmin h0a).elim
    · have h0a : 0 < min a b := by
        have hab' : b ≤ a := le_of_not_ge hab
        simpa [min_eq_right hab'] using hb
      intro h0
      have hmin : min a b ≤ 0 := (uIcc_subset_Icc_min_max (le_of_not_ge hab)) h0.1
      exact (not_lt_of_le hmin h0a).elim

by_cases hab : a ≤ b
    · have ha' : a ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt ha
      refine not_mem_uIcc_of_lt ?_
      exact lt_of_lt_of_le ha hab
    · have hb' : b ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hb
      refine not_mem_uIcc_of_lt ?_
      exact lt_of_lt_of_le hb (le_of_not_ge hab)

by_cases hab : a ≤ b
    · have ha' : a ≤ 0 := by
        intro h0
        have : 0 ≤ a := (le_uIcc_iff hab).1 h0 |>.1
        exact not_lt_of_ge this ha
      have hb' : 0 ≤ b := le_trans ha' hab
      exact not_lt_of_ge hb' hb
    · have hba : b ≤ a := le_of_not_ge hab
      have hb' : b ≤ 0 := by
        intro h0
        have : 0 ≤ b := (le_uIcc_iff hba).1 h0 |>.1
        exact not_lt_of_ge this hb
      have ha' : 0 ≤ a := le_trans hb' hba
      exact not_lt_of_ge ha' ha

by_cases hab : a ≤ b
    · have ha' : a ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt ha
      have h0lt : 0 < min a b := by
        simp [hab, ha, lt_of_lt_of_le ha hab]
      have : ¬ (0 ∈ uIcc a b) := by
        intro h0
        have : min a b ≤ 0 := (mem_uIcc.1 h0).1
        exact (not_lt_of_ge this) h0lt
      exact this
    · have hb' : b ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hb
      have h0lt : 0 < min a b := by
        simp [hab, hb, lt_of_lt_of_le hb (le_of_not_ge hab)]
      have : ¬ (0 ∈ uIcc a b) := by
        intro h0
        have : min a b ≤ 0 := (mem_uIcc.1 h0).1
        exact (not_lt_of_ge this) h0lt
      exact this

have ha' : a ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt ha
    have hb' : b ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hb
    by_cases hab : a ≤ b
    · have : a ≤ 0 ∧ 0 ≤ b := by
        simpa [uIcc, hab] using (show (0 : ℝ) ∈ Set.Icc a b from by
          simpa [Set.mem_Icc] using (by
            intro
            · exact (by
                have : a ≤ 0 := by
                  simpa [Set.mem_Icc] using this.1
                exact this)
            · exact (by
                have : 0 ≤ b := by
                  simpa [Set.mem_Icc] using this.2
                exact this)))
      exact ha'.elim (le_antisymm (le_trans ha.le this.1) ha.le)
    · have : b ≤ 0 ∧ 0 ≤ a := by
        simpa [uIcc, hab] using (show (0 : ℝ) ∈ Set.Icc b a from by
          simpa [Set.mem_Icc] using (by
            intro
            · exact (by
                have : b ≤ 0 := by
                  simpa [Set.mem_Icc] using this.1
                exact this)
            · exact (by
                have : 0 ≤ a := by
                  simpa [Set.mem_Icc] using this.2
                exact this)))
      exact hb'.elim (le_antisymm (le_trans hb.le this.1) hb.le)

have ha0 : a ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt ha
    have hb0 : b ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hb
    by_cases hab : a ≤ b
    · have : a ≤ 0 := by
        intro h0
        have h0' : 0 ∈ uIcc a b := by
          refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
          · exact h0
          · exact le_trans h0 hab
        exact (lt_irrefl 0) (lt_of_lt_of_le ha (h0'.1))
      exact ha0 (le_antisymm this (le_of_lt ha))
    · have hba : b ≤ a := le_of_not_ge hab
      intro h0
      have hb' : b ≤ 0 := h0.1
      exact hb0 (le_antisymm hb' (le_of_lt hb))

simpa [uIcc, min_def, max_def, ha.ne', hb.ne'] using
      (by
        intro h
        rcases h with ⟨h₁, h₂⟩
        have : a ≤ 0 := le_trans (min_le_left a b) h₁
        exact (not_le_of_gt ha) this)

have ha' : (0 : ℝ) ≠ a := ne_of_gt ha
    have hb' : (0 : ℝ) ≠ b := ne_of_gt hb
    by_cases hab : a ≤ b
    · have h0lt : (0 : ℝ) < min a b := lt_min ha hb
      have h0le : (0 : ℝ) ≤ min a b := le_of_lt h0lt
      have : min a b ≤ (0 : ℝ) := by
        simpa [uIcc, hab] using (show (0 : ℝ) ∈ Icc (min a b) (max a b) → min a b ≤ (0 : ℝ) from fun h => h.1)
      exact (not_le_of_gt h0lt) this
    · have hba : b ≤ a := le_of_not_ge hab
      have h0lt : (0 : ℝ) < min a b := lt_min ha hb
      have : min a b ≤ (0 : ℝ) := by
        simpa [uIcc, hba] using (show (0 : ℝ) ∈ Icc (min a b) (max a b) → min a b ≤ (0 : ℝ) from fun h => h.1)
      exact (not_le_of_gt h0lt) this

have ha' : a ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt ha
    have hb' : b ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hb
    by_cases hab : a ≤ b
    · have : 0 < a ⊓ b := by simpa [inf_eq_left.2 hab] using ha
      exact (not_mem_uIcc_of_lt (by simpa [inf_eq_left.2 hab] using ha)).elim
    · have : 0 < b ⊓ a := by
        have hba : b ≤ a := le_of_not_ge hab
        simpa [inf_eq_left.2 hba] using hb
      have hba : b ≤ a := le_of_not_ge hab
      have : 0 < a ⊓ b := by simpa [inf_eq_right.2 hba] using hb
      exact (not_mem_uIcc_of_lt (by simpa [inf_eq_right.2 hba] using hb)).elim

have ha0 : a ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt ha
    have hb0 : b ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hb
    by_cases hab : a ≤ b
    · have : 0 < min a b := by simpa [min_eq_left hab] using ha
      have hne : (min a b : ℝ) ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt this
      have : (0 : ℝ) < max a b := by
        have : 0 < b := hb
        have : 0 < max a b := lt_of_lt_of_le this (le_max_right a b)
        exact this
      have hne' : (max a b : ℝ) ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt this
      exact (uIcc_eq_Icc hab ▸ by
        simpa [uIcc, hab, ha0, hb0] using (not_mem_Icc_of_lt (lt_of_lt_of_le (lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_lt (lt_of_lt_of_le ha (le_min hab (le_of_lt hb))) ) (by simpa using hne)) (le_of_lt (lt_of_lt_of_le ha (le_min hab (le_of_lt hb))))) (lt_of_lt_of_le hb (le_max_right a b))))
    · have hba : b ≤ a := le_of_not_ge hab
      have : 0 < min a b := by simpa [min_eq_right hba] using hb
      have hne : (min a b : ℝ) ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt this
      have : (0 : ℝ) < max a b := by
        have : 0 < a := ha
        have : 0 < max a b := lt_of_lt_of_le this (le_max_left a b)
        exact this
      have hne' : (max a b : ℝ) ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt this
      exact (uIcc_eq_Icc hba ▸ by
        simpa [uIcc, hba, ha0, hb0] using (not_mem_Icc_of_lt (lt_of_lt_of_le (lt_of_lt_of_le hb (le_min hba (le_of_lt ha))) (le_of_lt (lt_of_lt_of_le hb (le_min hba (le_of_lt ha))))) (lt_of_lt_of_le ha (le_max_left a b))))

have ha' : a ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt ha
    have hb' : b ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hb
    by_cases hab : a ≤ b
    · have : 0 < a := ha
      have : 0 < b := hb
      have h0 : ¬ (0 ∈ Set.uIcc a b) := by
        intro h0
        have h0a : a ≤ 0 := (Set.mem_uIcc.1 h0).1
        exact (not_lt_of_ge h0a) ha
      exact h0
    · have h0 : ¬ (0 ∈ Set.uIcc a b) := by
        intro h0
        have h0b : b ≤ 0 := (Set.mem_uIcc.1 h0).1
        exact (not_lt_of_ge h0b) hb
      exact h0

by_cases hab : a ≤ b
    · have ha' : a ≤ 0 := le_of_not_gt
      have hb' : 0 ≤ b := le_of_not_gt
      intro h0
      have h0' : (0 : ℝ) ∈ Set.Icc a b := by
        simpa [uIcc, hab] using h0
      exact (lt_irrefl (0 : ℝ)) ((lt_of_lt_of_le ha (h0'.1.trans ha')) )
    · intro h0
      have h0' : (0 : ℝ) ∈ Set.Icc b a := by
        simpa [uIcc, hab] using h0
      have hb0 : b ≤ 0 := h0'.1
      exact (not_lt_of_ge hb0) hb
simp [uIcc, ha.ne', hb.ne']

by_cases hab : a ≤ b
    · have h0 : 0 < min a b := by
        have : 0 < a := ha
        have : 0 < b := hb
        simpa [min_eq_left hab] using this
      intro h
      have : min a b ≤ 0 := by
        have : 0 ∈ uIcc a b := h
        exact this.1
      exact (not_lt_of_ge this) h0
    · have h0 : 0 < min a b := by
        have hab' : b ≤ a := le_of_not_ge hab
        have : 0 < b := hb
        simpa [min_eq_right hab'] using this
      intro h
      have : min a b ≤ 0 := by
        have : 0 ∈ uIcc a b := h
        exact this.1
      exact (not_lt_of_ge this) h0

have ha' : a ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt ha
    have hb' : b ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hb
    have h₁ : 0 ∉ Set.uIcc a 0 := by
      by_cases h : a ≤ 0
      · simpa [Set.uIcc_of_le h]
      · have : 0 ≤ a := le_of_lt (lt_of_not_ge h)
        simpa [Set.uIcc_of_ge (le_of_lt (lt_of_not_ge h)), ha']
    have h₂ : 0 ∉ Set.uIcc 0 b := by
      by_cases h : 0 ≤ b
      · simpa [Set.uIcc_of_le h, hb']
      · simpa [Set.uIcc_of_ge (le_of_not_ge h)]
    by_cases hab : a ≤ b
    · have : 0 < a ∧ a ≤ b := ⟨ha, hab⟩
      intro h0
      have : 0 ∈ Set.uIcc a b := h0
      have : a ≤ 0 := this.1
      exact (not_lt_of_ge this) ha
    · have : b ≤ a := le_of_not_ge hab
      intro h0
      have : 0 ∈ Set.uIcc a b := h0
      have : b ≤ 0 := this.1
      exact (not_lt_of_ge this) hb

by_cases hab : a ≤ b
    · have ha0 : a ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt ha
      have hb0 : b ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hb
      have hpos : ∀ x ∈ Set.uIcc a b, 0 < x := by
        intro x hx
        have hx' : a ≤ x := (Set.mem_uIcc.1 hx).1
        exact lt_of_lt_of_le ha hx'
      intro h0
      have : (0 : ℝ) ∈ Set.uIcc a b := h0
      exact (lt_irrefl (0 : ℝ)) (hpos 0 this)
    · have hba : b ≤ a := le_of_not_ge hab
      have ha0 : a ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt ha
      have hb0 : b ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hb
      have hpos : ∀ x ∈ Set.uIcc a b, 0 < x := by
        intro x hx
        have hx' : b ≤ x := (Set.mem_uIcc.1 hx).1
        exact lt_of_lt_of_le hb hx'
      intro h0
      have : (0 : ℝ) ∈ Set.uIcc a b := h0
      exact (lt_irrefl (0 : ℝ)) (hpos 0 this)

have ha0 : a ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt ha
    have hb0 : b ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hb
    by_cases hab : a ≤ b
    · have h0a : 0 < min a b := lt_min ha (lt_of_lt_of_le hb hab)
      have h0 : 0 ≠ min a b := ne_of_gt h0a
      intro hmem
      have : 0 = min a b := by simpa [uIcc, hab] using congrArg id hmem
      exact h0 this.symm
    · have hba : b ≤ a := le_of_not_ge hab
      have h0b : 0 < min a b := lt_min (lt_of_lt_of_le ha hba) hb
      have h0 : 0 ≠ min a b := ne_of_gt h0b
      intro hmem
      have : 0 = min a b := by simpa [uIcc, hab] using congrArg id hmem
      exact h0 this.symm
successful_attempts:
have ha' : a ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt ha
    have hb' : b ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hb
    by_cases hab : a ≤ b
    · have h0 : a ≤ 0 ∧ 0 ≤ b → False := by
        intro h
        exact (not_le_of_gt ha) h.1
      have : ¬(a ≤ 0 ∧ 0 ≤ b) := by
        intro h; exact h0 h
      simpa [uIcc_of_le hab, mem_Icc, ha', hb'] using this
    · have hab' : b ≤ a := le_of_not_ge hab
      have h0 : b ≤ 0 ∧ 0 ≤ a → False := by
        intro h
        exact (not_le_of_gt hb) h.1
      have : ¬(b ≤ 0 ∧ 0 ≤ a) := by
        intro h; exact h0 h
      simpa [uIcc_of_ge hab', mem_Icc, ha', hb'] using this

have hab : 0 < min a b := by
      have ha' : 0 < a := ha
      have hb' : 0 < b := hb
      exact lt_min ha' hb'
    intro h0
    have : min a b ≤ 0 := by
      simpa [uIcc, mem_Icc] using h0.1
    exact (not_lt_of_ge this) hab
